changelog: IMAP email ingest now has a shared-hosting fallback that can run after a normal app page load when cron or loopback HTTP requests are unavailable
Pseudo-cron is enabled by default for new self-hosted installations and remains throttled to avoid repeated background runs
New ticket forms no longer carry over the previous company or assignee selection after a ticket is created
New ticket company and assignee values are still preserved on validation errors so users do not lose an in-progress form
